H4: Search ================================================== AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE ================================================== H1: Custom Retractor Lite 36 Banners for Trade Show & Indoor Display H2: Lightweight Retractable Banner Stands for Professional Indoor Displays H2: Retractor Banner Material Options for Trade Show Applications H2: Banner Artwork & Design Requirements for Retractor Stand Printing H2: Retractor Banner Production Times & Turnaround Options H2: Payment & Ordering Options for Custom Retractor Banners H2: Shipping Guidelines for Retractor Banner Stand Delivery H2: Trade Show & Event Uses for Retractor Lite Banner Stands H2: Order Your Custom Retractor Banner Stand Today H2: Frequently Asked Questions ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW # Custom Retractor Lite 36 Banners for Trade Show & Indoor Display ## Professional Lightweight Retractable Banners with Durable Hardware & Custom Printing PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice: 13 oz Vinyl for Banner Retractors 14 oz No Curl Vinyl for Banner Retractors Banner Soft Fabric for Banner Retractors Product: with Retractor Lite 36 Hardware Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 78" x 36" PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Lightweight Retractable Banner Stands for Professional Indoor Displays

The Retractor Lite 36 provides the perfect balance of economy and quality for professional indoor banner displays. This lightweight retractor features a reliable mechanism designed for occasional trade show displays, seasonal advertising, and promotional events. Each unit includes a protective nylon carrying case for easy transport between venues.

Your custom banner display includes both the durable aluminum retractor hardware and a professionally printed 78" x 36" banner. The compact design makes setup and breakdown quick and effortless, while the stable base ensures your graphics remain prominently displayed throughout your event.

Choose from three premium printing materials to match your specific display requirements: weather-resistant vinyl for versatile use, no-curl vinyl for smooth professional finishes, or soft fabric material for vibrant color reproduction and wrinkle-free storage.

The retractor mechanism smoothly extends and retracts your custom graphics, protecting your investment between uses. The included carrying case keeps all components organized and secure during transport, making this banner stand ideal for businesses that regularly participate in trade shows, conferences, or promotional events.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retractor Banner Material Options for Trade Show Applications

With this product, you will receive the banner retractor hardware and a professionally printed 78" x 36" banner using your choice of premium materials.

Material Options:

13 oz Vinyl: Our most standard banner material, rated for both indoor and outdoor use. Provides excellent durability and print quality for extended display periods.

14 oz No Curl Vinyl: High quality prints with a smooth matte finish that resists curling and maintains flat display appearance throughout extended use.

Banner Soft Fabric: Matte finish with vibrant colors that resist wrinkles and fold compactly for easy storage and transport.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application.

Click here to request a free sample packet of materials.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Retractor Banner Hardware & Assembly

Each Retractor Lite 36 includes premium aluminum hardware designed for reliable indoor display performance. The lightweight construction makes transport effortless while maintaining stability during extended display periods.

Hardware Features:

Aluminum Base: Stable foundation prevents tipping during indoor use and provides professional appearance at trade shows and events.

Smooth Retraction System: Spring-loaded mechanism ensures consistent banner extension and secure retraction for protection between uses.

Adjustable Support Pole: Telescoping pole allows for secure banner positioning and easy height adjustment during setup.

Protective Carrying Case: Durable nylon case with handles keeps all components organized and protected during transport and storage.

The banner attaches securely to the retractor mechanism using the included mounting hardware. Setup requires no tools and can be completed in under two minutes by one person.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Retractor Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from two to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given

5 Business Days Saver:

If you're not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment & Ordering Options for Custom Retractor Banners

All retractor banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards for immediate processing of your custom banner order.

We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order and artwork proof if requested.

Order Approval Process:

Your retractor banner order follows our standard approval workflow to ensure accuracy before production begins. This includes verification of artwork specifications, material selection, and shipping details.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Retractor Banner Stand Delivery

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped standard.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

Shipping Methods Available:

  • Economy (5–10 Business Days)
  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)

Important Shipping Notes:

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery. Please visit our shipping information page for more information about our Retractor Lite 36 shipping times.

International Shipping:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Trade Show & Event Uses for Retractor Lite Banner Stands

The Retractor Lite 36 banner stand serves multiple professional display applications across various industries and events. Its portable design and quick setup make it ideal for businesses that need reliable indoor advertising solutions.

Trade Show Applications:

  • Booth backdrops and side displays
  • Product announcements and feature highlights
  • Company branding and logo displays
  • Directional signage within exhibit spaces

Business & Retail Uses:

  • Seasonal promotion displays in stores
  • Reception area welcome messages
  • Conference room presentation support
  • Lobby and entrance branding

Event & Meeting Applications:

  • Conference speaker introductions
  • Workshop and seminar signage
  • Registration table displays
  • Awards ceremony backdrops

Educational & Institutional:

  • Campus event promotion
  • Department and program advertising
  • Student organization displays
  • Fundraising campaign visuals

The lightweight construction makes this banner stand particularly suitable for organizations that frequently transport displays between venues or store equipment between events.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Artwork & Design Requirements for Retractor Stand Printing

Professional artwork preparation ensures your retractor banner displays with optimal print quality and visual impact at trade shows and events.

Artwork Guidelines:

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

File Requirements:

  • Recommended formats: .eps, .pdf, high-resolution .tiff or .jpg
  • Resolution: 300 DPI or higher for optimal print quality
  • File size limit: 60 MB for online uploads
  • For larger files, please call for upload instructions

Design Considerations:

  • Account for the 78" x 36" display dimensions in your layout
  • Include appropriate bleed areas for trimming
  • Ensure text readability from typical viewing distances
  • Consider banner material characteristics in color selection

Artwork Proofing Options:

Order Proofs: If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System: If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Custom Retractor Banner Stand Today

Transform your trade show presence with professional custom retractor banners that combine portability, durability, and striking visual impact. Our Retractor Lite 36 banner stands deliver the perfect balance of quality and affordability for businesses that need reliable indoor display solutions.

Each complete banner stand package includes premium aluminum hardware, your custom-printed 78" x 36" banner, and a protective carrying case for easy transport. Choose from three professional printing materials designed to showcase your graphics with exceptional clarity and color vibrancy.

With production times as fast as 2 business days and flexible shipping options, you can have your custom retractor banner ready for your next trade show, conference, or promotional event. Our experienced team handles everything from artwork preparation to final quality inspection.

Ready to create your professional banner display? Use our online configurator to select your material, upload artwork, and place your order in minutes. For custom design assistance or technical questions, our graphic design team is available to ensure your retractor banner exceeds expectations.

Installation Videos:

VIDEO 1: How to Install the Retractor Lite 36 Banner Stand

VIDEO 2: How to Change a Banner for the Retractor Lite 36

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What's included with my Retractor Lite 36 order?

Your complete order includes the aluminum retractor hardware, your custom-printed 78" x 36" banner, and a durable nylon carrying case for transport and storage.

How portable is the Retractor Lite 36 banner stand?

The lightweight design and included carrying case make transport effortless. Setup and breakdown can be completed by one person in under two minutes without any tools required.

What material should I choose for indoor trade show use?

For indoor applications, our 14 oz No Curl Vinyl provides excellent print quality with a smooth matte finish, while Banner Soft Fabric offers vibrant colors and wrinkle-free storage.

Can I change the banner graphics later?

Yes, replacement banners can be ordered separately and easily installed using the existing hardware. This allows you to update messaging for different events while reusing the same retractor base.

What file types work best for artwork?

Vector-based files like .eps with outlined fonts produce the best results. We also accept high-resolution .pdf, .tiff, or .jpg files at 300 DPI or higher.

How stable is the banner stand during display?

The aluminum base provides excellent stability for indoor use. While designed primarily for indoor applications, the stand remains secure in typical trade show and event environments.

What's the difference between express and standard production?

Express production (2 business days) offers faster turnaround for urgent deadlines, while standard production (3 business days) provides the same quality at our regular pricing.

Do you provide design services?

Yes, our professional graphic designers can create custom artwork for your retractor banner. Simply provide your instructions and any reference materials when placing your order.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
